findings.evidence: `SemigroupGroupPullback.lean:58` has `(φ : W →+ V)`, while `PositiveDefinite/Pullback.lean:59` has `theorem comp {Φ : Type*} [FunLike Φ N M] [AddHomClass Φ N M] ...`.
findings.fix: State the main theorem as `{Φ : Type*} [FunLike Φ W V] [AddHomClass Φ W V] (φ : Φ)` and derive the explicit `AddMonoidHom`/continuous-linear-map forms from it.
findings.issue: `comp_spatialAddMonoidHom` is stated only for `φ : W →+ V`, unlike the existing pullback API's homomorphism-class form.

findings.evidence: `SemigroupGroupPullback.lean:72` proves only `comp_spatialAddEquiv_iff`; `PositiveDefinite/Pullback.lean:75`, `:89`, and `:95` provide the corresponding surjective descent and iff lemmas before deriving the equivalence case at `:102`.
findings.fix: Add `of_comp_spatial..._surjective` and `comp_spatial..._iff_of_surjective` for surjective additive homomorphisms/homomorphism classes, then derive `comp_spatialAddEquiv_iff` and the continuous-linear-equivalence form as special cases.
findings.issue: The iff result is only for additive equivalences, but the natural nearby API proves descent/equivalence along any surjective homomorphism.

findings.evidence: `SemigroupGroupPullback.lean:86-89` assumes `(φ : W →+ V)` but the body is just `hF.comp (continuous_fst.prodMk (hφ.comp continuous_snd))`, with no additive-map property used.
findings.fix: Generalize it to `(φ : W → V) (hφ : Continuous φ)` and let the packaged additive/CLM lemmas call that version.
findings.issue: `continuous_comp_spatialAddMonoidHom` unnecessarily requires an additive homomorphism; the proof only uses `φ` as a continuous function.

summary: The new pullback API is below the nearby TauCeti/Mathlib generality level in a few public signatures.
